Sonia Alves Ribeiro

I'm

About

Mathematician and technology enthusiast with almost two years of experience defining requirements, designing, implementing, testing and delivering back-end and web applications using variety programming languages and technologies. I specialize in Java and have professional experience working with HTML, CSS, Python and Javascript.
Likes cats, painting and drawing. Passionate about music and building new things. Always learning something new.
